chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. NO. D-4616 / 2021 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ D/O MATTER. For hearing of CMA No. 2671/2025. 01.10.2025. None present for Petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Ms. Masooda Siraj, Advocate for Respondent. ___________________ None present on behalf of the Petitioner. It appears that this Petition was dismissed on 16.01.2025 as not maintainable and not for non-prosecution. Therefore, this application is misconceived and is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
